name: ng-date-picker
title: Date Picker (Angular)
description: Composite of Popover + Calendar with Gremorie defaults - a trigger button showing the formatted date opens the calendar in a Spartan-ng brain popover. Single-mode by default. Mirrors React DatePicker from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-date-picker.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
